title: Level Text Fix
description: Fixes issues related to the level text in Minecraft.
body:
This mod aims to fix several issues related to the level text used by enchantments and potions in Minecraft. These fixes will be applied automatically when the mod is installed however config options are also provided.


What this mod does:

  • Fix missing localization entries for levels greater than 10. Rather than showing "enchantment.level.11" you will see "XI".
  • Add accessibility options for those less familiar with roman numerals. You can replace all roman numerals with their modern counterparts or set a threshold for when they should switch over. For example you may be comfortable with numbers 10 and below, but not know that "XLVII" means 47. These options are disabled by default meaning you will only see roman numerals.

 

What this mod does NOT do:

  • Allow you to get enchantments with higher levels in survival.
  • Change the maximum level of enchantments that can be applied.
  • Remove the technical cap on how high an enchantment level can be.

Note: Versions of this mod for legacy versions of Minecraft may not have the full feature set. For example versions prior to 1.19.2 only fix the missing level text and do not provide the accessibility features.
